promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active A2 control memory, as a clean Gemini digest, or as authority to promote replayed packs, literal thermodynamic language, teleology overlays, axis 4/5/6 semantics, or final engine tables into current law from this parent alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because it is the next folder-order source-bearing big-doc after the Grok integrated-model child and still lacks a bounded A2-mid reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already exposes the strongest bounded seam: least-noisy QIT and anti-drift registry material, replay and generated-pack inflation around it, a late user correction manifesto that restates the intended deliverable, live axis 4/5/6 semantic conflict, and a final trust warning that demotes the last engine table.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The Grok swap child was used to preserve repair-over-rhetoric and lower-bit conflict handling, the GPT child was used to preserve mixed-parent demotion and accepted-packet versus truth separation, and the apple-axis child was used to preserve versioned axis-term conflict rather than flattening axes 4/5/6 into a single freeze.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the user correction manifesto is too important to leave outside the first child; it reinterprets what the earlier generated packs were actually supposed to achieve.
Deferred because the correction block is most useful when read against the registry and replay inflation it is correcting.
Deferred because the final engine tables are lower-value than the trust, governance, and axis-conflict boundaries that surround them.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass artifacts already isolate the mixed replay structure, the QIT registry seam, the user correction manifesto, the axis 4/5/6 conflict, and the final trust warning. A later quote-bound pass can reopen raw lines if exact table or manifesto phrasing becomes necessary.

They remain contradiction-preserving, source-linked, and explicitly below active A2 authority.
